jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at B.Braun India
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!
